input_text: An elephant was strong. The cup filled with water fell. Muggles cannot disappear. The student carrying the books greeted the teacher. The letter was written. Sheep are afraid of mice. Sue is a true patriot. Bears eat most boxers. Sandra went back to the bathroom. Mary, a pilot, smiled. Eve kept the milk in the fridge. The toy of the child was broken. Daniel journeyed to the hallway. The picture was painted by Leo. Mr Dursley is an American. Mike is a boxer. The car parked behind the house was blue. John Smith is bad. The man standing by the door coughed. Dole was defeated by Clinton. Tom wanted to leave. The stone was heavy. Anna handed Mark a key. Greg is a bear. Amazon's length is 20 kilometers. Probably Tallinn is in Estonia. Any person is male or female. The road leading to the village was narrow. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. "Riga is not in America. Earth contains Europe. Frogs are small. The tree was cut by the farmer. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Bears eats Mike?
